10.7 - Partial Payment Adjustment 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

A. Partial Payment Adjustment Criteria 

An HHA receives a national, standardized 30-day payment of a predetermined rate
